Atelier
HomeFeaturesDownload

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

Atelier is a kanban board for people who find most tools too loud. It has exactly the features a focused workflow needs.

Three-column board

Every project starts with To do, Working on, and Completed. Click any column title to rename it — make it match how you actually think, not how some PM textbook does.

Multiple projects

Projects live as icon glyphs in the left rail. Add a new one with + at the bottom. Each project has its own name, icon, and accent colour so you can tell them apart at a glance.

Cards that move

Drag cards between columns or reorder within a list. Drop them anywhere — Atelier figures out the right position. Use ⌘↵ to save a new card, Esc to cancel.

Clear done with one click

Finished a sprint? The Completed column has a clear button that removes all done cards at once. No hunting through a list, just a clean slate.

Appearance

Atelier looks right in any light.

Light / Dark / System

Pick a fixed mode or follow the OS. Switching is instant — no reload, no flicker.

Accent colours

Eight accent colours to pick from. Used on buttons, highlights, and interactive elements throughout the app.

Density

Comfortable or Compact. Comfortable gives cards more room to breathe; Compact fits more on screen.

Keyboard shortcuts

Everything has a shortcut. None of them are surprising.

⌘ N

New project

⌘ ,

Open settings

⌘ [

Previous project

⌘ ]

Next project

⌘ ↵

Save card

Esc

Cancel or close

Truly local-first

Your data lives in ~/Library/Application Support/com.jude.atelier/atelier-state.json. No account, no server, no subscription. Quit mid-write and nothing is lost — Atelier writes a timestamped backup to localStorage on every change, and on launch it picks whichever copy is newer.

No network needed

Fonts ship inside the app via Fontsource. Once downloaded, Atelier needs zero network access to run. It also auto-checks for updates silently and only surfaces one if it finds something new.

Ready to try it?

Free download, no sign-up required.

Download for Mac

© 2026 Atelier — your data stays on your device
